recipe.title: Black Forest trifle
recipe.description: This epic dessert looks super-impressive, but it’s full of store-cupboard shortcuts that make it really easy to put together. Perfect for the festive season!

steps.descr: Drain the cherries through a sieve into a measuring jug,...
steps.instructions: Drain the cherries through a sieve into a measuring jug, topping up with cold water to make a pint (568ml), if needed. Pour into a medium pan and place on a medium heat. Transfer the cherries to a bowl.

on_enter.say: Drain the cherries through a sieve into a measuring jug, topping up with cold water to make a pint (568ml), if needed. Pour into a medium pan and place on a medium heat. Transfer the cherries to a bowl.

steps.descr: To make the chocolate curls, lay the unwrapped chocolate...
steps.instructions: To make the chocolate curls, lay the unwrapped chocolate on the work surface, flat side up. Carefully drag a chef’s knife towards you, from top to bottom. Repeat until you have 6 to 8 good curls. Transfer the curls to a plate, and leave in the fridge until you’re ready to decorate.

on_enter.say: To make the chocolate curls, lay the unwrapped chocolate on the work surface, flat side up. Carefully drag a chef’s knife towards you, from top to bottom. Repeat until you have 6 to 8 good curls. Transfer the curls to a plate, and leave in the fridge until you’re ready to decorate.

steps.descr: Snap the remaining chocolate into a heatproof bowl, add...
steps.instructions: Snap the remaining chocolate into a heatproof bowl, add a pinch of sea salt and place over the pan of the cherry liquor, until melted.

on_enter.say: Snap the remaining chocolate into a heatproof bowl, add a pinch of sea salt and place over the pan of the cherry liquor, until melted.

steps.descr: Snap 4 gelatine leaves into a small bowl, cover with...
steps.instructions: Snap 4 gelatine leaves into a small bowl, cover with cold water, and set aside to dissolve.

on_enter.say: Snap 4 gelatine leaves into a small bowl, cover with cold water, and set aside to dissolve.

steps.descr: Remove the bowl of chocolate from the heat, pour in the...
steps.instructions: Remove the bowl of chocolate from the heat, pour in the custard and mix until completely combined.

on_enter.say: Remove the bowl of chocolate from the heat, pour in the custard and mix until completely combined.

steps.descr: Whisk the gelatine into the cherry juice until...
steps.instructions: Whisk the gelatine into the cherry juice until dissolved, then pour into the trifle dish. Scatter in a handful of the cherries and leave to cool, then place in the fridge for 4 hours until set.

on_enter.say: Whisk the gelatine into the cherry juice until dissolved, then pour into the trifle dish. Scatter in a handful of the cherries and leave to cool, then place in the fridge for 4 hours until set.

steps.descr: Toast the hazelnuts in a dry pan for 5 minutes, until golden
steps.instructions: Toast the hazelnuts in a dry pan for 5 minutes, until golden. Tip into a pestle and mortar and bash to crumbs.

on_enter.say: Toast the hazelnuts in a dry pan for 5 minutes, until golden. Tip into a pestle and mortar and bash to crumbs.

steps.descr: Pour the cream into a large mixing bowl, add the vanilla...
steps.instructions: Pour the cream into a large mixing bowl, add the vanilla bean paste and sugar, and whisk to soft peaks.

on_enter.say: Pour the cream into a large mixing bowl, add the vanilla bean paste and sugar, and whisk to soft peaks.

steps.instructions: Next, layer up the trifle. Spoon over ⅓ of the chocolate custard, spreading out with a spatula, and then top with 1 slice of panettone. Dot cherries over the panettone and drizzle with a little of the juice from the bottom of the bowl.

on_enter.say: Next, layer up the trifle. Spoon over ⅓ of the chocolate custard, spreading out with a spatula, and then top with 1 slice of panettone. Dot cherries over the panettone and drizzle with a little of the juice from the bottom of the bowl.

steps.descr: Repeat with a layer of cream, chocolate custard,...
steps.instructions: Repeat with a layer of cream, chocolate custard, panettone, and cherries and syrup until you have 3 x each layer. Pipe over a final layer of cream (or you can just spoon it on, if you prefer).

on_enter.say: Repeat with a layer of cream, chocolate custard, panettone, and cherries and syrup until you have 3 x each layer. Pipe over a final layer of cream (or you can just spoon it on, if you prefer).

steps.descr: Sprinkle over the chocolate curls, scatter over the...
steps.instructions: Sprinkle over the chocolate curls, scatter over the hazelnut crumbs and take to the table.

on_enter.say: Sprinkle over the chocolate curls, scatter over the hazelnut crumbs and take to the table.
